lic TypedIOPort input The input port. This base class imposes no type constraints except that the type of the input cannot be greater than the type of the output. output public TypedIOPort output The output port. By default, the type of this out

The output port. By default, the type of this output is constrained to be at least that of the input. Constructor Detail Transformer public Transformer ( CompositeEntity container, java.lang.String name) throws NameD
